group_b.payout_notes: Death benefit is the highest of 10x annualized premium, 105% of premiums paid, or sum assured (regular/limited); or higher of 125% of single premium or sum assured (single).

derivation_notes.concern_tag_reasoning: As a pure term assurance plan, it serves as income replacement for dependents and provides a death benefit for estate planning. It lacks savings, investment, or medical components.
ambiguous_calls: surrender_value_applicable is false, therefore builds_cash_value and cash_value_loan_available are false.
